# Time Square Media

> Time Square Media (TimesSquare Media Services Pvt. Ltd.) is a full-spectrum
> advertising agency in India delivering Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising,
> Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH), digital marketing, BTL activations, on/in
> media, retail consultancy and web solutions — all executed in-house,
> under one roof, across six cities.

Time Square Media has 17+ years of experience, 10,000+ media units pan-India,
100+ associate partners and 500+ campaigns executed. Offices in Delhi,
Lucknow, Kanpur, Bhopal, Agra and Prayagraj.

## Services

- Brand Building (OOH): billboards, hoardings, unipoles, gantries, LED video walls, bus shelters — https://timesquaremedia.in/services
- Mobile Media: auto/toto branding, metro & bus wraps, activity vans — https://timesquaremedia.in/services
- Digital Marketing: Google & Meta ads, SEO, social media, influencer marketing — https://timesquaremedia.in/services
- On / In Media: neon & crystal LED signage, dealer boards, window displays — https://timesquaremedia.in/services
- BTL & Activations: event activations, experiential marketing, on-ground campaigns — https://timesquaremedia.in/services
- Retail Consultancy: retail branding, in-store solutions, visual merchandising — https://timesquaremedia.in/services
- Web Solutions: website design & development, e-commerce, SEO-ready builds — https://timesquaremedia.in/services

## Which OOH format suits which business

- Real estate, banks, FMCG, retail — hoardings, unipoles and gantries on high-footfall arterial roads and highways for 24/7 brand-landmark visibility.
- Restaurants, gyms, clinics, retail stores — place-based and on/in media (signage, window displays, neon) right at the point of decision.
- D2C, food delivery, local services, e-commerce — mobile media (auto/toto branding) and transit ads for dense, repeated local impressions at low cost.
- Product launches, sales, time-sensitive offers — Digital OOH (DOOH) / LED video walls for creative that can change by time of day or promotion.
- FMCG launches, colleges, malls — BTL activations and experiential setups for direct, personal engagement.
- Multi-city or national brand awareness — a mix of static OOH (for reach/frequency) plus digital marketing (for measurable conversions).

## OOH vs DOOH vs Digital Marketing — quick guidance

- Traditional OOH (static billboards/hoardings): lowest cost per impression, cannot be blocked or skipped, best for pure brand-building and long campaigns.
- Digital OOH (DOOH): programmatic, screen-based, content can rotate/update by time, weather or audience — best for launches, promotions and short flexible bursts.
- Digital marketing (Google/Meta/SEO): precise targeting and trackable conversions — best paired with OOH/DOOH, not as a replacement for it.
- Recommended mix for most Indian brands: 50–60% OOH/DOOH for city-wide awareness, 30–40% digital marketing for lead generation and retargeting, balance for BTL/on-ground.
